creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From bug 265224 comment 6: 

> … URLs such as 
> <ftp://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/amd64/14.0-CURRENT> 
> remain usable, …

… and now I see, today's edition of 
<https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/README.TXT> seems to leave 
<ftp://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/freebsd/snapshots/README.TXT> outdated. 

Region-specific? Etc. … hopefully, not umpteen README files to consider … sorry!
